title: Hosted instance will shut down
text: Due to a lack of funding we have to shut down the hosted HQ instance. If you want to help keep this running or have ideas, hit us up at engage@open-politics.org. Code stays open, infrastructure needs resources. We thus currently recommend to self-host.

title: Thanks 39c3
text: We did a spontaneous workshop at 39c3. More people showed up than expected. Many interesting and egaged discussions - thank you! - Writing up a blogpost with the shared dashboard from our analysis togetyher + picking up threads from the workshop. Thanks creatures! <3

title: Registration now open
text: You can now register for an account. Sign up and start using HQ for your research and analysis workflows.

title: Documentation online
text: Docs are live at docs.open-politics.org. Still in beta testing. Feedback welcome.

title: Talk at CCCB Datengarten
text: Open Source Public Intelligence presentation at Chaos Computer Club Berlin. Video recording available.

title: Coming online
text: Public beta for geospatial (Globe UI) and search modules launching soon.
